Static key checks: yaml:"-" fields are invisible to selection keys, and
a default: value must name a known case.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/config => CONFIGDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- store/store.go --
package store

//fabrik:config store
type Config struct {
	Kind   string `yaml:"kind" default:"redis"`
	Hidden string `yaml:"-"`
}

//fabrik:provider:select store.-
type Store interface {
	Get(key string) string
}

type Memory struct{}

func (*Memory) Get(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemory() *Memory { return &Memory{} }

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Cache interface {
	Lookup(key string) string
}

type MemCache struct{}

func (*MemCache) Lookup(key string) string { return key }

//fabrik:provider case=memory
func NewMemCache() *MemCache { return &MemCache{} }

//fabrik:provider:select store.kind
type Queue interface {
	Push(item string)
}

type RedisQueue struct{}

func (*RedisQueue) Push(item string) {}

//fabrik:provider case=redis
func NewRedisQueue() *RedisQueue { return &RedisQueue{} }

type RedisQueue2 struct{}

func (*RedisQueue2) Push(item string) {}

//fabrik:provider case=redis
func NewRedisQueue2() *RedisQueue2 { return &RedisQueue2{} }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import (
	"net/http"

	"app/store"
)

type Handlers struct {
	Store store.Store
	Cache store.Cache
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/diags --
error: store/store.go:9:1: config key "store.-" does not match any //fabrik:config field
  help: declare the key as a string field of a //fabrik:config struct
error: store/store.go:21:1: config key "store.kind" defaults to "redis", which matches no case= implementation
  help: known cases: memory; add a provider with case=redis or fix the default: tag
error: store/store.go:49:1: duplicate implementation for case=redis
  help: first declared at $WORK/store/store.go:42:1
